parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1: You now have some time to look at the questions on your screen. Now answer the questions on your screen. So, what services will you be wanting?

Speaker 2: Our most popular service is our Saver deal. With that, you can have your telephone connection and internet services for a monthly fee of $25 and no setup charge.

Speaker 1: Well, that sounds like a good deal. I'll try that. What bandwidth do I get each month for that?

Speaker 2: It's unlimited. We can also provide cable television as well. Of course, there are a variety of packages that you can choose from, depending on which channels you want.

Speaker 1: I won't go for the TV just yet. I might do that later. So, that's our Saver deal at $25 a month. Do you need an actual phone? As we have a nice selection in our catalogue and our engineer can bring it round when he comes for installation.

Speaker 1: No, thanks. I've got my old phones from my previous house.

Speaker 2: OK. Now, when would you like our engineer to come round and make the installation?

Speaker 1: Is it possible during the weekend?

Speaker 2: We used to be able to install on Saturday mornings, but the unions didn't like that, so now only on weekdays, I'm afraid.

Speaker 1: Can it be done this week?

Speaker 2: Let's look. Today's Tuesday, the 13th July. Wednesday's full. But Thursday we can do it at 9 a.m.

Speaker 1: Ah, no. I'll have to be at the factory then on Thursday. Any chance late afternoon on Thursday?

Speaker 2: I don't think so. No. No, we had a cancellation at 4.30 p.m. on Friday. How about that?

Speaker 1: That should be fine. Let's check. Oh, dear. I'll still be in a meeting then. How about an hour later?

Speaker 2: Yes, 5.30 is OK. It'll just take an hour and our engineer's shift that day ends at 6.30 p.m., so that will fit perfectly.
